message:
feat(cli): add direct pane assignment to ntm assign command

Add --pane flag for direct assignment of beads to specific panes, bypassing
the normal strategy-based matching. Includes support for:
- --pane=N to specify target pane index
- --force to assign even if pane is busy
- --ignore-deps to skip dependency checks
- --prompt for custom prompts on direct assignment

Stub implementation prepared for future completion (bd-3nde).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
